user.title: Forecast Place
user.description: Search a forecast place by name, or enter an exact postal code or MeteoSwiss point ID. ZIP codes, locations and points of interest such as peaks, passes and huts are supported. You will confirm the selected forecast place in the next step.

reconfigure.title: Forecast Place
reconfigure.description: Search a forecast place by name, or enter an exact postal code or MeteoSwiss point ID. ZIP codes, locations and points of interest such as peaks, passes and huts are supported. You will confirm the selected forecast place in the next step.

forecast_pick.title: Select Forecast Place
forecast_pick.description: Choose the forecast place you want to use, or select Search again.

details.title: Stations
details.description: Review the forecast display name and choose the weather and pollen stations.

data.stationCode: Weather station for current weather state
data.weatherWarningsNumber: Number of weather warnings to show as separate entities (default: 1)

error.forecast_query_required: Enter a forecast place search term.
error.forecast_query_too_short: Enter at least 2 letters or an exact postal code / point ID.
error.forecast_query_not_found: No matching forecast places were found.
error.invalid_forecast_point: Select one of the matching forecast places.
